title: UAE's Gargash slams Gulf allies' response as 'weakest in history'
snippet: UAE senior adviser Anwar Gargash: 'The GCC's position is the weakest in history, considering the nature of the attack and the threat it poses to everyone.' While GCC states supported each other logistically, political/military response was inadequate. 'I expected such a weak stance from the Arab League; I don't expect it from the GCC.' Said containment efforts toward Tehran including mediation, shared energy projects and trade have 'failed miserably.'
tag_reason: 가르가쉬의 GCC 비판은 4/27 발언이나 이전 보고서에 포함되지 않은 신규 정보. GCC 서밋과 직접 관련.
